story:
There was a party at the baths. I swam into the lake, then climbed up; near the deck I saw Felix flanked by Nicole and Daniela. Jealousy cut me. I took a glass, toasted him; he raised his; I dived again.

Next day Nicole whispered, “He drove me home.” I swallowed tears. At noon an email from Felix said it was a pity I’d only looked in briefly, asked me to dinner, and said I had worn the most beautiful dress. Furious, I replied that I was too busy to mess around.
question: After receiving the narrator’s angry refusal to his dinner invitation, what will Felix most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Follow up with another message to apologize and ask to meet anyway.
answer_without_knowledge: Stop writing and drop the invitation.
